changeSet.author: system
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE public.analytics_outbox ALTER COLUMN outbox_id DROP IDENTITY;
-- Set the sequence value to match the current max outbox_id + 1 SELECT setval('public.analytics_outbox_seq', COALESCE((SELECT MAX(outbox_id) FROM public.analytics_outbox), 0) + 1, false);

rollback.sql: ALTER TABLE public.analytics_outbox ALTER COLUMN outbox_id DROP DEFAULT;
ALTER TABLE public.analytics_outbox ALTER COLUMN outbox_id SET DEFAULT nextval('public.analytics_outbox_outbox_id_seq');
